evals.prompt: I want to add a Web URL to every Person in the AI space.
evals.expected_output: Intent restated, then Discover (schema + duplicate candidates + off-schema delta), then the Plan template, then a DRY_RUN script the editor runs — not executed by the skill.
assertions: Produces all four Discover outputs (schema, duplicate candidates, current state, off-schema delta)
Posts the Discovery + Gates + Plan template as one message and waits for 'go'
Writes a .ts script with DRY_RUN = true and does NOT run it unless explicitly asked

evals.prompt: What types are in the crypto space?
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this is a pure read question and routes to geo-query instead of generating a script.
assertions: Routes to geo-query (read) and does not write or run a script
Does not emit the publish Plan template for a read-only question
